items.title_zh: 在 Meta x AI 的宏大叙事中，我们看到了失败（Llama 4 hurhurhur），现在我们……
items.description: in the grand narrative of Meta x AI, we saw the flop (Llama 4 hurhurhur), and now we’re seeing the turn: - *more* hiring since the soup wars of 2025 - Zuck literally moved in with Alexandr and Nat and is koding again - finally GA’ed Opus-i…
items.description_zh: 在 Meta x AI 的宏大叙事中，我们看到了失败（Llama 4 hurhurhur），而现在我们看到了转折： - 自 2025 年汤战争以来*更多*招聘 - Zuck 确实搬到了 Alexandr 和 Nat 那里，并且再次开始了 - 最后 GA’ed Opus-i ……

items.title: I've commented that "this is the year of subagents", but that is largely an optimization…
items.title_zh: 我评论过“这是子代理的一年”，但这很大程度上是一种优化……
items.description: I've commented that "this is the year of subagents", but that is largely an optimization problem. the inverse problem - having agents that compose and boss agents that manage/query them - is a capabilities one. as an advisor to cog, proud…
items.description_zh: 我曾评论过“这是子代理的一年”，但这很大程度上是一个优化问题。相反的问题——拥有组成的代理和管理/查询它们的老板代理——是一个能力问题。作为 cog 的顾问，自豪……

items.title: Introducing Gemini on Mac.
items.title_zh: 在 Mac 上介绍 Gemini。
items.description: Introducing Gemini on Mac. We heard your feedback. We recruited a small team. They built 100+ features in less than 100 days. 🤯 100% native Swift. Lightning fast. Let us know what you think! https://t.co/BxS4WLSn5V
items.description_zh: 在 Mac 上介绍 Gemini。我们听到了您的反馈。我们招募了一个小团队。他们在不到 100 天内构建了 100 多个功能。 🤯 100% 原生 Swift。快如闪电。让我们知道您的想法！ https://t.co/BxS4WLSn5V

items.title: Feels like there's an outage for Claude every other day
items.title_zh: 感觉克劳德每隔一天就会停电一次
items.description: Feels like there's an outage for Claude every other day - I wonder if this is related to the pace of shipping, just scaling compute, or something else?
items.description_zh: 感觉克劳德每隔一天就会出现一次中断——我想知道这是否与运输速度、扩展计算或其他什么有关？

items.title: I recently came back from a 2-week trip to China and it was eye-opening to see how the wo…
items.title_zh: 我最近结束了为期两周的中国之旅，看到世界各地的情况真是令人大开眼界……
items.description: I recently came back from a 2-week trip to China and it was eye-opening to see how the world's second largest economy operates. I think every product builder should visit at least once to understand: → Chinese AI work culture → Electric ve…
items.description_zh: 我最近结束了为期两周的中国之行，看到世界第二大经济体的运作方式让我大开眼界。我认为每个产品制造商都应该至少参观一次以了解： → 中国人工智能工作文化 → 电动汽车……

items.title: You can also set your autocompact threshold yourself and effectively lower your context w…
items.title_zh: 您还可以自己设置自动压缩阈值，并有效地降低您的上下文......
items.description: You can also set your autocompact threshold yourself and effectively lower your context window if you'd prefer. For example, 400k context is a good compromise: CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=400000 claude see docs here: https://t.co/NuhBu…
items.description_zh: 如果您愿意，您还可以自行设置自动压缩阈值并有效降低上下文窗口。例如，400k 上下文是一个很好的折衷方案：CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW=400000 claude 请参阅此处的文档：https://t.co/NuhBu...

items.title: I edited the intro because I realized I buried the lede originally- The 1M context window…
items.title_zh: 我编辑了简介，因为我意识到我最初埋葬了 lede - 1M 上下文窗口......
items.description: I edited the intro because I realized I buried the lede originally- The 1M context window is a double-edged sword. It allows Claude to do more complex tasks but it can also leads to more context pollution if you don't manage your session w…
items.description_zh: 我编辑了简介，因为我意识到我最初埋葬了 lede - 1M 上下文窗口是一把双刃剑。它允许 Claude 执行更复杂的任务，但如果您不管理会话，它也会导致更多的上下文污染......

items.title: If finding security flaws is fully automated with frontier models à la Mythos, then GitHu…
items.title_zh: 如果发现安全漏洞是通过神话中的前沿模型完全自动化的，那么 GitHu ……
items.description: If finding security flaws is fully automated with frontier models à la Mythos, then GitHub should have a metric, like stars, showing how much compute is spent securing/hardening an open-source package. Example: 📦 linus/linux ⭐️ 200k 🦾 $2…
items.description_zh: 如果通过前沿模型（如神话）完全自动化地发现安全漏洞，那么 GitHub 应该有一个指标，例如星星，显示用于保护/强化开源包的计算量。示例：📦 linus/linux ⭐️ 200k 🦾 $2…
